s3.name: S3_STORAGE_INTEGRATION
s3.comment: Storage integration for S3 bucket access

load_wh.name: LOAD_WH
load_wh.comment: Dedicated ingestion warehouse for loading files from stages into Bronze tables using COPY operations and batch loads.

transform_wh.name: TRANSFORM_WH
transform_wh.comment: ETL/ELT warehouse for heavy SQL transformations, merges, joins, and pipeline processing from Bronze → Silver → Gold.

streamlit_wh.name: STREAMLIT_WH
streamlit_wh.comment: Lightweight warehouse optimized for low-latency dashboard queries and interactive Streamlit app usage.

adhoc_wh.name: ADHOC_WH
adhoc_wh.comment: Development and sandbox warehouse for ad-hoc queries, experimentation, troubleshooting, and testing.

aqi_database.name: AQI_DATABASE
aqi_database.comment: Central analytical database hosting ingestion, transformation, modeling, and presentation layers for the AQI platform.

schemas.name: BRONZE
schemas.comment: Raw - Landing zone for raw source data (JSON/CSV/Parquet). Minimal transformations. Supports replay and auditing.

raw_external_stg.name: RAW_EXTERNAL_STG
raw_external_stg.comment: External stage for storing incoming AQI raw files before COPY ingestion.

raw_internal_stg.name: RAW_INTERNAL_STG
raw_internal_stg.comment: Internal stage for temporary file storage and processing.

json_file_format.name: JSON_FILE_FORMAT
json_file_format.comment: JSON parsing configuration for raw ingestion.

raw_aqi.name: RAW_AQI
raw_aqi.comment: Raw ingestion table storing AQI payloads as VARIANT with metadata columns.

columns.name: INDEX_RECORD_TS
columns.comment: Timestamp of the AQI index record

columns.name: JSON_DATA
columns.comment: Raw JSON payload from AQI source

columns.name: RECORD_COUNT
columns.comment: Number of records in the JSON payload

columns.name: _STG_FILE_MD5
columns.comment: Audit - MD5 hash of the stage file

columns.name: _COPY_DATA_TS
columns.comment: Audit - Timestamp when data was copied

raw_aqi_stream.name: RAW_AQI_STREAM
raw_aqi_stream.comment: Captures incremental inserts/updates to trigger downstream task execution.

copy_air_quality_data.name: COPY_AIR_QUALITY_DATA
copy_air_quality_data.comment: Scheduled COPY INTO from stage to bronze table.

process_aqi_stream_task.name: PROCESS_AQI_STREAM_TASK
process_aqi_stream_task.comment: Triggered by stream changes; runs transformations bronze → silver → gold.

raw_aqi_pipe.name: RAW_AQI_PIPE
raw_aqi_pipe.comment: Auto-ingest pipe for raw AQI JSON data from S3

schemas.name: SILVER
schemas.comment: Cleansed - Standardized, deduplicated, and validated datasets ready for transformation.

clean_aqi_dt.name: CLEAN_AQI_DT
clean_aqi_dt.comment: Cleansed and validated AQI dataset auto-refreshed from bronze.

schemas.name: GOLD
schemas.comment: Curated - Business-ready facts/dimensions and aggregated models optimized for analytics and BI.

schemas.name: STREAMLIT
schemas.comment: Serving - Presentation layer optimized for dashboards, apps, and interactive workloads.
